A Monster Calls

"Stories are wild creatures."

7.3
2016MOVIEPG-13Released

Synopsis

12-year-old Conor encounters an ancient tree monster who proceeds to help him cope with his mother's terminal illness and being bullied in school.

Tags

dreamsmonsterbased on novel or booknightmaregrandparent grandchild relationshiptruthtreeartistbullyingterminal illnessbullycancerdiseasegrandmother
